stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Where would the westerlies (shown in green) and trade winds (shown in red) be located in July relative to the equator?

options.a: Trade wind area doubled in size and moved North of the equator.
options.b: Trade winds both moved south by around 5-10 degrees.
options.c: Trade winds both moved north by around 5-10 degrees.
options.d: Normal globe split equidistant of the equator.
